name: SQLite Browser
description: Browse and query SQLite databases with AI assistance
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Compatibility with the latest Nimbalyst runtime.
1.0.1: More reliable AI edits and inline embeds for edited files.
marketplace.tagline: Browse and query SQLite databases with AI assistance
marketplace.longDescription: Open any SQLite database file and browse tables, run queries, and explore data visually. The AI can write SQL queries, analyze table structures, and help you understand your data. Supports .db, .sqlite, .sqlite3, and .db3 files.
highlights: Visual table browser with data preview
AI writes and explains SQL queries

screenshots.alt: SQLite database browser showing tables, schema, and query results
